title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Fracking is one of the most toxic and environmentally damaging forms of fossil fuel extraction.
Fracking pollutes water sources and air, and can even cause earthquakes.
Burning fossil fuel is at the heart of the problem of carbon emissions.
California is one of the largest oil producers.
Fracking can have serious environmental and community health consequences.
Fracking impacts water supply, air quality, and seismic activity.
Many California communities rely on scant water resources, which are becoming scarcer due to climate change.
